Metadata.title: Certo Governance Institute Foundation
Metadata.description: An independent rating organization assessing governance quality in the public, corporate, medical and defence sectors.

Home.title: Certo Governance Institute
Home.description: A public credibility index based on governance quality.
Home.hero_subtitle_kowalski: We identify organisations you can trust — because they operate effectively and safely.
Home.hero_title_prof: Effective operations mean safety and success
Home.hero_subtitle_prof: Go beyond declarative compliance. Certo objectively evaluates operational resilience, decision quality and information transparency, powered by Certo Vector analytics.
Home.why_title: The world measures everything. Except governance quality.
Home.why_text: We have sophisticated tools for measuring financial risk, product quality, and carbon footprint. But no one has yet built a comparable system that measures the quality of governance itself — how institutions make decisions, account for their consequences, and protect the trust of those they serve. This is the G gap in ESG — and Rating Certo fills it.
Home.manifest_text: Traditional ratings (like Moody's or S&P) assess creditworthiness, and ISO standards are often just paper declarations. Certo evaluates the real culture of operations under pressure. We measure whether organisations operate effectively.
Home.differentiation_iso: ISO is a declaration on paper; Certo is an assessment of real operational culture under pressure.
Home.differentiation_esg: ESG focuses on environmental and social impact. Certo extracts the 'G' and turns it into hard dimensions of operational effectiveness.
Home.differentiation_moodys: Traditional agencies assess creditworthiness. Certo assesses operational and governance capability.
Home.why_rhetorical: How many times have you heard about poor governance destroying institutions from within — and no one measured it before it was too late?
Home.founder_quote: For forty years I observed how public offices, hospitals, companies and organisations function. I came to the conviction that the right to live in a society governed honestly, transparently and competently is a fundamental right — just like the right to education, healthcare or a fair trial.
Home.founder_certo_quote: Certo means certainty — and that is exactly why I am establishing a Foundation, not a company: because some things should not belong to anyone, so they can serve everyone.
Home.pillars_subtitle: Each assessment is based on four measurable dimensions of governance quality.
Home.pillar_1_short: Can the organisation maintain continuity of operations in a crisis?
Home.pillar_2_short: Are decisions made with proper procedure, objectivity and accuracy?
Home.pillar_3_short: How openly and credibly does the organisation communicate with its environment?
Home.pillar_4_short: Does the organisation effectively allocate capital, time and people?
Home.denoiser_title: From information noise to a credible assessment
Home.denoiser_layer_1_desc: We collect data from public registers, analytical databases and open sources — both Polish and international.
Home.denoiser_layer_2_desc: We filter, weight and normalise information signals. We eliminate noise, duplicates and contradictions.
Home.denoiser_layer_3_desc: We deliver a structured risk picture to the analyst instead of raw information noise.
Home.rhetorical_standard: Why has no one yet created a unified, global standard of public credibility?
Home.product_roadmap_desc: A transparent development roadmap for organisations — stage, achievements, plans and development needs visible to investors, partners and society.
Home.product_whistleblower_desc: Secure, encrypted channels for reporting irregularities with full whistleblower data protection and case monitoring.
Home.product_own_desc: An ownership register — a structured system for identifying beneficial owners, capital structures and ownership relationships.
Home.product_certoid_desc: A user panel with detailed rating data, organisation profiles and analytical tools.
Home.pilot_cta_title: Submit an entity for the free pilot programme
Home.pilot_cta_text: In Q4 2026, we are launching the first public credibility assessment processes based on governance quality. The pilot is free of charge. Your organisation can help shape the new standard.
Home.benefits_title: Why do organisations choose to be assessed?
Home.benefits_card1_intro: Rating Certo is not a certificate for the wall. It is a set of tools that help understand how an organisation truly functions — and how it can function better.
Home.benefits_card1_item1: Certo Score — a clear-cut assessment on a 0–100 scale
Home.benefits_card1_item2: Certo Vector — a map of strengths and areas for development
Home.benefits_card1_item3: Evaluation report — detailed analysis with recommendations
Home.benefits_card1_item4: Certo RoadMap — a public development roadmap visible to stakeholders
Home.benefits_card1_item5: Trust Badge Certo — a digital trust mark
Home.benefits_card2_title: How does it change the organisation?
Home.benefits_card2_intro: Does your organisation know how it truly makes decisions? Can it measure it? Rating Certo provides what no internal audit can — an independent mirror.
Home.benefits_card2_item2: Sectoral benchmark — comparison with peer entities
Home.benefits_card2_item3: A basis for reporting to boards and supervisory bodies
Home.benefits_card3_title: What does it mean for the environment?
Home.benefits_card3_intro: Rating Certo tells the environment more than a declaration on a website. Certo Score is the first clear signal that an institution takes governance quality seriously.
Home.benefits_card3_item1: Citizens and clients see institutional credibility
Home.benefits_card3_item2: Investors and partners gain a measurable governance indicator
Home.benefits_card3_item4: Employees and candidates understand the management culture

About.title: About Certo Governance Institute Foundation
About.organ_board_role: Executive body — manages day-to-day operations, represents the Foundation externally, implements statutory objectives.
About.organ_supervisory_role: Internal oversight body — supervises the Board, audits compliance with the statute, protects the Foundation's independence. Separate from and not subordinate to the Board.
About.organ_standard_role: A standing expert structure of a scientific and advisory nature. Safeguards the integrity, independence and rigour of the Foundation's standards and research methodology.
About.organ_tribunal_role: An independent expert structure that reviews appeals against ratings, assessments and certificates. Ensures evaluated entities the right to challenge their assessment.
About.founder_preamble: For forty years I observed how public offices, hospitals, companies and organisations function. I came to the conviction that the right to live in a society governed honestly, transparently and competently is a fundamental right — just like the right to education, healthcare or a fair trial.
About.founder_quote: Certo means certainty — and that is exactly why I am establishing a Foundation, not a company: because some things should not belong to anyone, so they can serve everyone.
About.principle_independence_desc: The independence of governance assessment depends not on the character of individuals, but on institutional architecture: the statute, funding mechanisms and accountability systems.
About.principle_reproducibility_desc: Every Rating Certo must be reproducible based on the published methodology and available source data.
About.principle_transparency_desc: The methodology is public and auditable. The assessed entity has the right to know what IT tools were used in the assessment process.
About.entity_foundation_desc: An independent rating organization, owner of the methodology. Designs the standard, publishes ratings, accredits advisors. Does not sell software.
About.entity_company_desc: Commercial technology operator. Builds and maintains the Certo platform, ensures data security, develops AI tools under the Foundation's supervision.
About.statute_desc: The Statute of Certo Governance Institute Foundation defines the objectives, organisational structure, principles of independence and oversight mechanisms.
About.organ_council_role: A standing cross-sector advisory-consultative body. Ensures institutional dialogue between the Foundation and entities representing the public, local government, non-governmental and business sectors. Members are organisations, not individuals.
About.organ_centre_role: A standing analytical-prospective structure. Identifies development trends, builds future scenarios and formulates recommendations on public policy and regulation.
About.mission_text_1: We build a culture of good governance through independent assessment and the promotion of governance standards in Europe.
About.mission_text_2: We believe that the right to live in a society managed honestly, transparently and competently is a fundamental right.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Certo Governance Institute Foundation
Contact.form_success: Your message has been sent. We will respond as soon as possible.

Pilot.title: Rating Certo Pilot Programme
Pilot.subtitle: Submit an entity for a free public credibility assessment based on governance quality — Q4 2026.
Pilot.program_description: In Q4 2026, we are launching the first free assessment processes as part of the public credibility index based on governance quality — Rating Certo. We accept applications both from organisations and from individuals who care about the transparency of institutions around them.
Pilot.who_intro: Rating Certo is a public tool. That is why the right to initiate an assessment belongs not only to organisations — but to anyone who has a reason to ask about governance quality.
Pilot.path_representative_desc: A board member, director, authorised representative or other person empowered to represent the organisation. They submit the entity for assessment from the position of someone responsible for its governance.
Pilot.path_representative_note: Ideal for organisations that want to consciously undergo assessment and strengthen their public credibility.
Pilot.path_observer_desc: A hospital patient, local resident, company client, investor, journalist, employee — anyone who cares about the transparency of institutions around them. You do not need to be affiliated with the organisation to ask how it is governed.
Pilot.path_observer_note: The Foundation reviews every application regardless of who submits it. A Public Observer does not need to justify their interest — it is enough to have one.
Pilot.sector_public_desc: Local government units, public administration institutions, municipal companies.
Pilot.timeline_title: What does the process look like?
Pilot.step_1_desc: Complete the application form — as an Organization Representative or a Public Observer.
Pilot.step_2_desc: Our team will assess the organisation's profile and match the appropriate assessment path.
Pilot.step_3_desc: Carrying out the assessment process according to the Rating Certo methodology.
Pilot.step_4_desc: A detailed report with the assessment and recommendations — shared with the assessed entity.
Pilot.benefits_title: Benefits of participating in the pilot
Pilot.benefit_1: Free public credibility assessment of your organisation
Pilot.benefit_2: Influence on shaping the Rating Certo methodology
Pilot.benefit_4: Access to a detailed report with recommendations
Pilot.form_type_representative_desc: I represent the organisation and am submitting it for assessment
Pilot.form_type_observer_desc: I am nominating an entity whose governance quality I want to know
Pilot.form_org_name: Name of the organisation to be assessed
Pilot.form_org_name_observer: Name of the entity you wish to nominate
Pilot.form_motivation: Why should this organisation be assessed?
Pilot.form_motivation_representative: Why do you want your organisation to undergo assessment?
Pilot.form_motivation_observer: Why do you believe this entity should be assessed?
Pilot.form_relation_placeholder: e.g. patient, local resident, client, investor, employee
Pilot.form_consent: I consent to the processing of my personal data for the purpose of considering my application for the Rating Certo pilot programme.
Pilot.form_consent_observer_note: Public Observer data is protected and is not shared with the assessed entity.
Pilot.form_success: Thank you for your application! We will contact you within 14 business days.
Pilot.form_error: An error occurred. Please try again or write to rating@certogov.org.

Experts.title: Join us in building the standard
Experts.subtitle: We are looking for experts, academics and practitioners who want to participate in creating the first global standard for assessing governance quality.
Experts.profile_governance_desc: Auditors, compliance officers, specialists in corporate governance and public management.
Experts.profile_academic_desc: Researchers in public administration, management, law, institutional economics.
Experts.profile_practitioners_desc: Experienced board members, supervisory board members, directors of public institutions.
Experts.accreditation_desc: We are building an accreditation programme for advisors and experts who want to professionally support organisations in the Rating Certo assessment process.
Experts.cta_desc: Learn more about the advisory programme and cooperation opportunities.

Rating.title: Rating Certo
Rating.subtitle: Public credibility index based on governance quality
Rating.score_desc: Objective, comparable governance quality assessment on a scale of 0–100.
Rating.vector_desc: A multidimensional organisation profile showing strengths and areas for improvement.
Rating.index_desc: An annual ranking of governance quality by sector and country.
Rating.pillar_1_desc: Can the organisation maintain continuity of operations in a crisis? Adaptability, contingency plans, speed of response to disruptions.
Rating.pillar_2_desc: Are decisions made with proper procedure, objectivity and accuracy? Percentage of decisions with quorum, conflict of interest management, decision-to-execution time.
Rating.pillar_3_desc: How openly and credibly does the organisation communicate with its environment? Data completeness, proactivity, absence of hidden agendas, culture of error reporting.
Rating.pillar_4_desc: Does the organisation effectively allocate capital, time and people's competencies? Focus of resources on strategic objectives, elimination of waste.
Rating.defacto_subtitle: We measure what organisations actually do — not what they declare.
Rating.defacto_iure_desc: Traditional systems measure what an organisation has on paper: statutes, policies, board composition. That is a photograph.
Rating.defacto_facto_desc: Rating Certo measures actual behaviours: does the board meet regularly? Does it respond to stakeholders? Does it fulfil obligations on time? That is a film.
Rating.human_control_title: Principle of Human Control over Ratings
Rating.human_control_desc: Certo ratings are the result of methodologies designed, approved and supervised by humans. No IT tool has decision-making autonomy in establishing, modifying or publishing ratings.
Rating.accord_title: Certo Accord — the right of appeal
Rating.accord_desc: Every entity subject to assessment has the right to submit comments and to lodge an appeal before the independent Trybunał Odwoławczy Certo.
Rating.benefits_title: Why is it worth being assessed?
Rating.benefits_deliverables_intro: Rating Certo is not a certificate for the wall. It is a set of tools that help understand how an organisation truly functions — and how it can function better.
Rating.benefits_deliverables_1: Certo Score — a clear-cut, comparable assessment on a 0–100 scale
Rating.benefits_deliverables_2: Certo Vector — a multidimensional profile of strengths and areas for development
Rating.benefits_deliverables_3: Evaluation report — detailed analysis with specific recommendations
Rating.benefits_deliverables_4: Certo RoadMap — a public development roadmap visible to investors, partners and society
Rating.benefits_deliverables_5: Trust Badge Certo — a digital trust mark for websites, documents and proposals
Rating.benefits_internal_title: How does the rating change the organisation from within?
Rating.benefits_internal_intro: Does your organisation know how it truly makes decisions? Can it measure it? Rating Certo provides what no internal audit can — an independent mirror. It shows where the organisation is strong and where it loses credibility. It provides an impulse for change that comes from outside but works inside.
Rating.benefits_internal_1: Objective diagnosis independent of internal structures
Rating.benefits_internal_2: Sectoral benchmark — comparison with peer entities in the same category
Rating.benefits_internal_3: Team motivation for change — rating as an external transformational impulse
Rating.benefits_internal_4: Reporting tool for the board, supervisory council and founding bodies
Rating.benefits_internal_5: A basis for strategic planning and resource allocation
Rating.benefits_external_title: What does the rating mean for the entity's environment?
Rating.benefits_external_intro: Rating Certo tells the environment more than a declaration on a website. For a hospital patient, a municipality resident, a company investor — Certo Score is the first clear signal that an institution takes governance quality seriously. Not because it has to. Because it wants to.
Rating.benefits_external_1: Citizens and clients see institutional credibility in a single indicator
Rating.benefits_external_2: Investors and partners gain a measurable governance quality indicator
Rating.benefits_external_3: Regulators gain independent validation of management standards
Rating.benefits_external_4: Media gain a comparable benchmark for sectoral analysis
Rating.benefits_external_5: Employees and candidates understand the organisation's management culture
Rating.benefits_cta: Submit an entity for the pilot
